description: Search Xiaohongshu notes, inspect creator profiles, resolve share links, and drill into note comments, replies, and note detail endpoints through JustOneAPI.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: Unique note identifier on Xiaohongshu.
parameters.name: noteId

parameters.description: Pagination cursor from the previous page (use the cursor value returned by the last response).
parameters.name: lastCursor

parameters.description:
Sort order for the result set.

Available Values:
- `normal`: Normal
- `latest`: Latest
parameters.name: sort

operations.description: Get Xiaohongshu (RedNote) note Search data, including snippets, authors, and media, for topic discovery.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: Search keyword.
parameters.name: keyword

parameters.description: Page number for pagination.
parameters.name: page

parameters.description:
Sort order for the result set.

Available Values:
- `general`: General
- `popularity_descending`: Popularity Descending
- `time_descending`: Time Descending
- `comment_descending`: Comment Descending
- `collect_descending`: Collect Descending
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description:
Note type filter.

Available Values:
- `_0`: General
- `_1`: Video
- `_2`: Normal
parameters.name: noteType

parameters.description:
Note publish time filter.

Available Values:
- `一天内`: Within one day
- `一周内`: Within a week
- `半年内`: Within half a year
parameters.name: noteTime
